name: Saucy Rhubarb and Strawberries
recipeIngredient: 2 cups rhubarb, cut into 1/2 inch slices or frozen sliced rhubarb (8 oz.)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, combine sugar and orange juice. Bring to boiling.
2. Add fresh or frozen rhubarb and return mixture to boiling.
3. Reduce heat and simmer, covered, for 5-7 minutes, or until the rhubarb is nearly tender.
4. Drain the rhubarb, reserving the syrup.
5. If necessary, add water to the reserved syrup to make 2/3 cup.
6. Pour the syrup into the saucepan and stir together cornstarch and water.
7. Stir the mixture into the syrup and cook until thick and bubbly.
8. Cook for an additional 2 minutes.
9. Remove from heat and gently stir in rhubarb and strawberries.
10. Cover and chill thoroughly (about 1 1/2 hours).
11. Makes 6 servings.
